A '''female Jedi Master''' lived sometime in the years between [[800 BBY/Legends|800]] and [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], [[Gender/Legends|woman]] was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] sometime circa [[800 BBY/Legends|800 BBY]]. Attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], she eventually came to possess a [[Vima-Da-Boda's lightsaber|lightsaber]] uncovered on the abandoned world of [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. While she never revealed how she retrieved the ancient artifact, she passed it down to [[Vima-Da-Boda's Master|her Padawan]] before she trained her [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knighthood]].<ref name="DEE" />
